task_completion.description: Log into OpenSIS using the provided admin credentials.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the OpenSIS application interface indicating a successful login (e.g., dashboard view, logged in as admin).

task_completion.description: Navigate to the attendance entry screen for 10th-grade students on November 4, 2024.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshot shows the attendance entry or roster page with the date 'November 4, 2024' (or '2024-11-04') and grade level '10' selected.
Screenshot shows the attendance status for 'Miguel Santos' set to 'Present' (or 'P', '1') in the OpenSIS interface.
Screenshot shows the attendance status for 'Aisha Patel' set to 'Absent' (or 'A', '0') in the OpenSIS interface.
Screenshot shows the attendance status for 'Dmitri Volkov' set to 'Tardy' (or 'T', 'Late') in the OpenSIS interface.

integrity.description: The agent used the OpenSIS graphical user interface to enter attendance.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a web browser displaying OpenSIS, not terminal commands, curl requests, or database scripts.

integrity.description: The agent did not change existing attendance records for other students.
integrity.visual_evidence: Other students on the roster do not have their attendance statuses actively modified by the agent.

integrity.description: The agent actually entered the data into the application.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent selecting options from the actual OpenSIS dropdowns/radio buttons and saving/submitting, rather than typing answers in a text editor.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Target date is November 4, 2024. Expected statuses (case-insensitive): Miguel Santos = Present (or P, 1); Aisha Patel = Absent (or A, 0); Dmitri Volkov = Tardy (or T, Late). All three students are in 10th grade.
